Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Forger technique]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — The First Elder of the Wei clan is rumored to know the Forger technique.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Forging is a type of technique where madra stays solid for a few seconds before dissipating.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon was struck by a Highgold's Forger technique.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Jai Daishou uses a Forger technique to create needles.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — The character used a Forger technique to forge a blade beneath them while falling.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 1''' — The Forger technique used by the old woman contains a life-poison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Ekerinatoth uses a whip-like Forger technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan uses a Forger technique to forge stars of pure madra in the air.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Kiro activated his Forger technique: the Titan’s Blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Daji can release his Forger technique to return blades to their original length.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 5''' — The Forger technique can be used to create living owls made of madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — The Forger technique can turn from gray to green.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Layering techniques may require using a Ruler technique, Striker technique, and Forger technique simultaneously.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — The attackers use Forger techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Forger techniques were used by enemies during the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — A fragment of a broken Forger technique left behind pale light madra.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Forger techniques can be used to push targets with force.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — The Forger technique summons a massive beast claw constructed from bloody madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — A Forger technique was used to launch a blood madra spirit.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — A specific Forger technique in the labyrinth can create an echo of a person.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — The Forger technique produces a gray, translucent cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon consumes the Forger technique.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
